productName: Torus - ROSIN COLD CURE - da FUNK 7 - 1g
description: Hand-pressed hybrid rosin from da FUNK 7 — solventless, full-spectrum, and prized by flavor chasers for a taste that stays honest to the living bud. Expect a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, a rich terpene punch, and a balanced head-and-body experience.
